name: Vault

methods.name: propose_admin
methods.desc: Start 2-step admin rotation. Admin OR guardian (guardian path = recovery).

methods.name: accept_admin
methods.desc: Complete admin rotation — only the proposed account may accept.

methods.name: propose_guardian
methods.desc: Start 2-step guardian rotation. Guardian only.

methods.name: accept_guardian
methods.desc: Complete guardian rotation — only the proposed account may accept.

methods.name: pause
methods.desc: Halt new borrowing (open_vault w/ borrow, borrow_more). Either role can pause.

methods.name: unpause
methods.desc: Resume borrowing. Guardian only — a compromised hot key cannot lift a lockdown.

methods.name: open_vault
methods.desc:
Create a new vault for (caller, pool_id).
Atomic group (no borrow): Payment (MBR) + AppCall open_vault + AssetTransfer (LP) Atomic group (with borrow): same — vault issues mUSD immediately after LP deposit

methods.name: pay_interest
methods.desc:
Pay accrued interest. Overpayment reduces principal; full repayment closes vault.
Atomic group: AssetTransfer (mUSD → vault address) + AppCall pay_interest(pool_id) The transfer MUST precede the app call: the vault forwards the principal-repayment portion (`change`) to the PSM via an inner transaction during this call, so the mUSD must already have landed in the vault (a later group txn has not executed yet).

methods.name: repay_principal
methods.desc:
Repay mUSD principal. Caller must clear accrued interest first.
Atomic group: AppCall repay_principal(pool_id) + AssetTransfer (mUSD → PSM address)

methods.name: add_collateral
methods.desc:
Deposit additional LP tokens into an existing vault.
Atomic group: AppCall add_collateral(pool_id) + AssetTransfer (LP → vault)

methods.name: borrow_more
methods.desc: Draw additional mUSD from an existing active vault.

methods.name: collect_fees
methods.desc: Sweep accumulated interest to the admin wallet as mUSD.

methods.name: collect_algo
methods.desc:
Sweep excess ALGO to the admin wallet.
Admin computes safe amount off-chain: contract_balance − (vault_count × 46_500) − buffer. The AVM rejects any amount that would drop below the contract's own min balance.

methods.name: opt_in_asset
methods.desc:
Opt vault contract account into an ASA (mUSD, LP tokens).
Must be called for every ASA the vault needs to hold before first use.

methods.name: mark_payment_overdue
methods.desc: Explicitly transition vault from active → payment_overdue after 90-day window.

methods.name: advance_accrual
methods.desc:
Admin: advance interest accrual on a vault (1-year cap per call).
Lets the protocol catch up interest on a multi-year-abandoned position by calling repeatedly before liquidation, since a delinquent borrower won't trigger accrual (P19-13).

methods.name: trigger_micro_liquidation
methods.desc:
Seize LP covering accrued interest + 5% buffer after 90-day non-payment.
Position continues; payment clock resets.

methods.name: trigger_partial_liquidation
methods.desc:
Seize 35% (tier 1) or 60% (tier 2) of LP for HF in [0.85, 1.0).
Sets vault_state = 2 pending admin mUSD settlement.

methods.name: trigger_full_liquidation
methods.desc:
Seize all LP for HF < 0.85. Sets vault_state = 2 pending settlement.
Surplus LP above total debt is returned to borrower immediately. Dust positions (total_lp_value == 0) are closed as bad debt immediately.

methods.name: settle_health_liquidation
methods.desc:
Settle a health-factor liquidation by returning mUSD to PSM.
Atomic group: AppCall settle_health_liquidation + AssetTransfer (mUSD → PSM address) May be called multiple times until the settlement counter (accrued_interest) reaches 0.

methods.name: set_rate
methods.desc: Set annual interest rate for new accrual periods. Cap: 3000 bps (30% APR).

methods.name: set_ltv
methods.desc: Set LTV for a pool. Must be strictly below the pool's liquidation threshold.

methods.name: set_liq_threshold
methods.desc: Set liquidation threshold. Must exceed LTV and be ≤ 9000 bps (90%).

methods.name: set_lp_asa_id
methods.desc: Register LP token ASA ID for a pool. Required before any vault can open.

methods.name: propose_lp_oracle
methods.desc:
Queue an LP-oracle reference change. Takes effect only after the 48h timelock via
confirm_lp_oracle; guardian may cancel before then. A malicious oracle could post arbitrary prices enabling over-borrow — hence the delay and the guardian veto.

methods.name: confirm_lp_oracle
methods.desc: Apply a queued LP-oracle change after the timelock has elapsed.

methods.name: cancel_pending_lp_oracle
methods.desc: Cancel a queued LP-oracle change. Admin or guardian (the guardian veto).

desc:
MagnetFi v2 Vault — LP collateral engine.

    Borrowers deposit Tinyman LP tokens and receive mUSD loans up to the LTV limit.
    Repayment is interest-only every ~90 days; principal is optional.
    Two independent liquidation paths: missed payment (micro-liq) and health factor (tiered).

    Two-role trust model:
      admin    — hot key: rates/LTV/thresholds, liquidations, fees, opt-in, advance accrual.
      guardian — cold key: pause/unpause borrowing, cancel queued oracle repoint, recover admin.

    Box storage: one VaultState per (borrower, pool_id) pair.
    BoxMap key_prefix = b"vault_"; suffix = borrower.bytes (32B) + itob(pool_id) (8B).

sourceInfo.errorMessage: LTV must be below liquidation threshold
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
open_vault not followed by LP transfer
open_vault not preceded by MBR payment
